chunks.text: Autodesk Maya Software - EECS Instructional License Autodesk Maya Software - EECS Instructional License public page Autodesk Maya licenses are available within EECS on an EECS instructional license server. Access is limited to EECS computers for

server. Access is limited to EECS computers for purposes that are directly related to learning, teaching, training, research and non-profit use. Computers in EECS instructional labs access these licenses. We obtained "no-fee" licenses for edu

se licenses. We obtained "no-fee" licenses for education by following the instructions on the UCB Software Central and Autodesk Education Community WEB sites. Faculty, grad students and staff with funded EECS accounts may get information about our li

ded EECS accounts may get information about our licenses here for their EECS computers (login with your EECS LDAP account and password) Please see maya.help for more information about Maya on the EECS instructional computers. EECS Instructional Sup
CS instructional computers. EECS Instructional Support Group (ISG) WEB: http://inst.eecs.berkeley.edu/~inst email: inst@eecs.berkeley.edu Thu Mar 19 05:32:39 PDT 2026
